title: Steven Leppard
compiled_truth: Steven Leppard is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-08-03), Steven Leppard sent 49 and received 161 emails, totalling 210 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (49), [Grant Masson](people/grant-masson) (18), [Dale Surbey](people/dale-surbey) (15), [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (11), [Tani Nath](people/tani-nath) (8).
